message.content:
@startuml
participant "Customer" as C1
participant "TripFinder" as TF
participant "Trip" as T
participant "Bicycle" as B

C1 ..> TF : suitable_trips(on_date, difficulty, need_bike)

TF ..> T : suitable_trips(on_date, on_difficulty)

note right of TF
for each trips
end note

TF ..> B : suitable_bicycle(trip_date, route_type)

TF <- B : result

@enduml
